prompt: An ultra-detailed 3D pop-up storybook style travel illustration of Beijing, China, presented on a beautifully unfolded vintage travel map, landscape composition. High-end collectible paper-craft pop-up book aesthetic: the entire city rises from the map as a miniature layered papercut diorama, museum-quality craftsmanship, hyper-realistic paper texture, vibrant travel-poster colors, whimsical warm magical storybook atmosphere, soft daylight with subtle depth shadows between paper layers, 8K masterpiece quality. A huge ornate decorative title banner rises from the page at the top center, displaying the Chinese characters "北京" in elegant gold-trimmed lettering. Landmarks arranged geographically like real Beijing geography: Top edge (far north): the Great Wall (Badaling) winding over layered paper mountains with watchtowers. Upper left (northwest): the Summer Palace with Kunming Lake, Longevity Hill pagoda and marble boat. Upper center-right (north): the Bird's Nest National Stadium and Water Cube as paper models. Center of map: the Forbidden City with golden-roofed halls in layered red paper walls, Jingshan hill pavilion behind it, Beihai Park white dagoba and lake to its left, Shichahai lake with small boats. Just south of center: Tiananmen gate with red walls, then Qianmen street with miniature shops and archway. Center-north: Nanluoguxiang hutong alleys with grey courtyard houses, rickshaws and red lanterns. Northeast: Yonghe Lama Temple with paper incense smoke curls. Right side (east): CBD skyline with CITIC Tower (China Zun) and CCTV building as modern paper skyscrapers. Bottom center (south): the Temple of Heaven with its round triple-tiered blue roof rising on layered paper. Background: bright blue sky made of layered paper, fluffy paper-craft clouds, a flying airplane, paper swallows and magpies, a decorative paper sun, floating paper kites, Chinese knots and lanterns. Foreground details: tiny paper figurines of tourists exploring, miniature market stalls selling candied hawthorn and Peking duck, small boats on rivers, locals in traditional Hanfu costumes, blooming paper peonies, plum blossoms and ginkgo trees spilling over the page edges, elegant gilded page corners with origami decorations, vintage travel book aesthetic, dragon dance festival procession, red lanterns. Rivers and canals as layered blue paper ribbons connecting the scenes, arched stone bridges, miniature yellow taxis and bicycles.
